title: Add test cases to cover podman volume
body:
Add test cases to cover below podman volume subcommand:
  create
  ls
  inspect
  rm
  prune

Signed-off-by: Yuhui Jiang <yujiang@redhat.com>
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

LGTM, but I'd like a signoff from @edsantiago before merge
LGTM aside from the `curl` comment, but I only gave it a quick once-over because I need to focus on #8165
